main.name: Nirmal Ragavan
main.description: Building scalable systems and modernizing enterprise applications. Java · Spring Boot · React · Node.js · Microservices
main.bio: I'm a Senior Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of experience building production-grade systems. I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, React.js, Node.js, and cloud-native microservices. I've led large-scale migration projects, optimized performance-critical APIs, and built SOX-compliant data pipelines. Open source contributor and freelancer passionate about developer tooling.
main.contactmessage: I'm currently open to senior engineering roles, tech-lead positions, and interesting freelance projects. Let's build something great together.

achievements.title: Java 8 → Java 11 Migration
achievements.description: Led the end-to-end migration of 16 microservices from Java 8 to Java 11 at BI-Worldwide, modernizing the stack and improving JVM performance.

achievements.title: API Performance Optimization
achievements.description: Optimized critical RESTful APIs using Spring Boot and Hibernate, reducing average response times by 40% through query tuning and caching strategies.

achievements.title: SOX Compliance System
achievements.description: Designed and built audit-trail mechanisms and SOX-compliant data pipelines ensuring regulatory compliance for financial reporting workflows.

achievements.title: Microservices Architecture
achievements.description: Architected and delivered event-driven microservices using Spring Boot, IBM BPM/BAW, and REST APIs integrated with MySQL and Oracle databases.

achievements.title: Open Source Packages
achievements.description: Published 3 NPM packages for React Native and React.js, addressing real-world image loading and UI component needs used by developers worldwide.

achievements.title: Freelance Delivery
achievements.description: Delivered 50+ freelance projects on Fiverr and Upwork with 5-star ratings, covering React, Node.js, React Native, MongoDB, and GraphQL stacks.

projects.name: Enterprise Microservices Migration Platform
projects.architecture: Event-driven microservices with IBM BPM/BAW orchestration and Spring Boot REST APIs
projects.challenges: Migrating legacy monolithic services to 10+ independent microservices while maintaining zero downtime and backward compatibility across 3 client integrations.
projects.outcome: Achieved 40% improvement in deployment frequency and enabled independent scaling of critical services, reducing system-wide failures.

projects.name: SOX Compliance Audit Pipeline
projects.architecture: Automated audit trail system with event sourcing and immutable log storage for financial data integrity
projects.challenges: Building a tamper-proof, audit-compliant logging system that captured all data mutations without impacting production throughput.
projects.outcome: Achieved full SOX compliance for financial workflows, passing enterprise-level security audits with zero violations.

projects.name: Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
projects.architecture: MERN stack single-page application with GraphQL API gateway and JWT-based authentication
projects.challenges: Designing a scalable product catalog with real-time inventory updates, cart synchronization, and secure payment flows.
projects.outcome: Delivered a production-ready platform serving 500+ concurrent users with sub-200ms API response times.

studies.title: Java 8 → Java 11 Migration at BI-Worldwide
studies.problem: 16 legacy services running on Java 8 with EOL risks, performance limitations, and incompatibility with modern libraries. Tight production schedule with zero tolerance for downtime.
studies.solution: Designed a phased migration strategy: service-by-service upgrade using feature flags, parallel deployment, and automated regression testing pipelines.
studies.architecture: Canary deployments with Spring Boot 2.x, modular dependency upgrades, and automated CI/CD pipelines using Maven and Jenkins.
studies.impact: Completed migration of all 16 services in 4 sprints. Improved build times by 30%, eliminated Java 8 EOL security risk, and unlocked access to modern Java APIs.

studies.title: API Performance Optimization for Client Dashboard
studies.problem: Client-facing dashboard API endpoints averaging 800ms+ response times causing poor UX and user drop-off during peak traffic.
studies.solution: Profiled bottlenecks using JProfiler, rewrote N+1 Hibernate queries with batch fetching, introduced Redis caching for frequently-accessed data, and added database indexes.
studies.architecture: Spring Boot service layer with Hibernate second-level cache, Redis cache aside pattern, and optimized SQL queries with EXPLAIN analysis.
studies.impact: Reduced average API response time from 800ms to under 200ms — a 75% improvement — with no schema-breaking changes to existing clients.

resume.skillmessage: Specialized in enterprise Java, cloud-native microservices, and modern frontend development.

Completed with a cumulative GPA of 7.14. Core coursework in electronics, systems design, and programming fundamentals.

Developed and optimized RESTful APIs and responsive UIs with React.js, Express.js, and Java Spring Boot. Designed SOX-compliant audit systems and implemented performance-critical data pipelines.

work.title: Software Engineer

work.title: Full Stack Engineer

posts.title: Java 8 to Java 11: Lessons from Migrating 16 Microservices
posts.description: Key challenges, strategies, and lessons from leading a production Java migration covering 16 services — zero downtime, backward compatibility, and modern API adoption.

posts.title: SOX Compliance for Java Engineers: What You Actually Need to Know
posts.description: Practical guide to designing audit-compliant systems in Java Spring Boot — covering event sourcing, immutable audit logs, and what SOX actually requires from your code.

posts.title: GraphQL vs REST: When to Use Each in Production
posts.description: Comparing GraphQL and REST from real production experience — when each shines, how to avoid common traps, and hybrid strategies that work.

testimonials.text: Nirmal did an amazing job and delivered this much faster than expected! I would definitely hire him again for any programming job. He understood the requirements immediately and started to work on it right away.
Great developer to work with. Very professional and time sensitive. I will keep working with him for long term!
Nirmal successfully delivered an online store using ReactJs, MongoDB, and NodeJs. He was able to listen and apply any updates or changes to the website. I was happy working with him!
Great job. Solid React Native skills.
